prompt: Create a full-body anime fashion character illustration on a plain white background, centered vertically with lots of clean negative space. The subject is a slim young woman with medium-brown skin and dark brown curly hair tied high in a puff, wearing oversized cream-colored over-ear headphones. Her face is intentionally covered by a flat square censor block in warm tan, hiding all facial features. She poses casually, standing with one hand tucked into her pants pocket and the other hand raised near her collar as if adjusting it. Outfit: an off-white cropped zip-up utility jacket with loose sleeves, an off-white fitted crop top underneath, very baggy high-waisted off-white cargo pants with a drawstring waist, large flap cargo pockets, dangling straps, wrinkled fabric folds, and chunky off-white sneakers. Add a small taupe crossbody bag with a thin strap running diagonally across her torso. Include subtle tattoo-like linework visible on one forearm and around the midriff. Use a refined fashion-concept-art style with thin sketchy ink outlines, muted beige and ivory tones, soft cel shading, delicate fabric creases, minimal shadows, and no text or background objects.
